problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: The key to What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? is Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating — specifically Atomic layer deposition — which would help 700,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
